mapper.sql: a.emp_plan_id, a.acft_sn, a.acft_type_cd, a.fuel_type_cd, a.acft_cnt, a.rmrk, a.use_bgng_dt, a.use_end_dt, a.frst_reg_dt, a.frst_reg_user_id, a.last_chg_dt, a.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM emp.tn_emp_acft a WHERE a.emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN a.use_bgng_dt AND a.use_end_dt ORDER BY a.acft_sn ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_acft (emp_plan_id, acft_sn, acft_type_cd, fuel_type_cd, acft_cnt, rmrk, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{empPlanId}, #{acftSn}, #{acftTypeCd}, #{fuelTypeCd}, #{acftCnt}, #{rmrk}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})

INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_acft (emp_plan_id, acft_sn, acft_type_cd, fuel_type_cd, acft_cnt, rmrk, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstEmpPlanId}, acft_sn, acft_type_cd, fuel_type_cd, acft_cnt, rmrk, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM emp.tn_emp_acft WHERE emp_plan_id = #{srcEmpPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
